litrev_item: Dissertation-safe wording: developed friction and Nu are reference limits, not default active closures
thesis_use: Use as framing language for hydraulic and thermal closure review
caveat: Do not state long branches use 64/Re or constant Nu by default.

target_section_or_chapter: Thermophysical properties; hydraulic closures; thermal closures
thesis_use: Convert literature review from prose citations into source-bounded evidence table
caveat: A source-bounded method is not a TAMU coefficient unless geometry, basis, and validation match.

thesis_use: Define static, hydrostatic, kinetic, straight/developing, recovery, and residual decomposition before coefficient naming
caveat: Pressure rise around a corner is not negative dissipation or admitted negative K by itself.

litrev_item: CFD postprocessing contract for pressure, heat, recirculation, source envelope, and same-QOI UQ
thesis_use: Use as methods table for required fields and diagnostic-only failure modes
caveat: Missing fields make rows diagnostic only; they do not justify invented pressure or heat terms.

thesis_use: Main-body ordinary-branch model form with gate table
caveat: Use only where stable signed net throughflow and no persistent exchange pass TAMU gates.

litrev_item: MF-02 section or cluster K with recirculation diagnostics
thesis_use: Main-body naming rule for component, section, and cluster pressure losses
admission_status: candidate naming rule; no component K admission
caveat: Use K_section or K_cluster unless isolation and recovery are demonstrated.

thesis_use: Main-body escalation lane for persistent local exchange and invalid one-bulk-state behavior
caveat: Do not fit exchange coefficients or implement Fluid/API changes from the thesis writing row.

admission_status: deferred unless negative net branch flow evidence exists
caveat: If behavior is local forward/reverse exchange inside one cross-section, use MF-04 instead.

target_section_or_chapter: Criteria for including a closure in the predictive model
thesis_use: State Re/Pr/Gr/Ri/Ra/Gz/F_A/F_m/recovery diagnostics as computed fields whose tolerances require TAMU calibration
caveat: Do not import universal thresholds from literature as TAMU switching values.

thesis_use: Separate internal Nu, wall conduction, insulation/contact, external convection, radiation, jacket/cooler, storage, and residual
caveat: Do not hide external or residual heat loss in internal Nu.

litrev_item: Current diagnostic/blocked pressure and thermal results interpreted through LitRev rules
target_section_or_chapter: Hydraulic behavior; thermal behavior; upcomer recirculation
thesis_use: Use LitRev to explain why negative/failed rows are useful model-form evidence
caveat: Do not upgrade current diagnostic rows into predictive coefficients.

litrev_item: MF-05 transient fitting loss and MF-06 CFD/POD/ROM
thesis_use: Park as future work with trigger conditions
caveat: MF-05 requires periodic positive-mean evidence; MF-06 requires verified FOM snapshot ensemble and held-out validation.
